label: Transparent Motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a water strider on the surface-tension plane, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single water strider insect with accurate anatomy: slim black body, long delicate hydrophobic legs, fine antennae, subtle silver highlights on leg joints and body edges, and tiny silver contact dimples plus very small circular ripple marks at each foot as part of the cutout. The insect should communicate lightweight interaction on still pond water without showing a pond background.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full insect and all legs without cropping; slightly top-down natural specimen angle, elegant horizontal stance.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves black body detail, silver ripple highlights, and crisp leg edges.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no lily pads, no pond scenery, no reeds, no fish, no second insect, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no large water sheet, no decorative background.

label: Light Design System
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board, final catalog source image
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive LIGHT MODE design-system board for a Morphous theme named exactly "Morphous Water Strider". The board is derived from a water strider motif: slim black body, long hairline legs, silver surface-tension ripples, pond green undertone, lightweight interaction system.
Canvas: exact 16:9 landscape board at 3840x2160 pixels. This must be a high-resolution source board, not a small preview. Avoid 1024px or 1672px preview-style output.
Board organization: precise product UI board with large readable labels and a clean modular grid. Use fewer larger examples so labels remain legible when downscaled.
Required visible sections: Morphous Water Strider, Water Strider, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status States, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese type guidance using short labels: Geist, Inter, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数字.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, data table rows, command palette/search menu, status chips, loading/empty/error states, token swatches, texture samples.
Visual language: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design system, realistic UI mockup, lightweight interaction, hairline separators like water-strider legs, silver ripple focus rings, still water spacing, calm pond-green accents, black graphite text, white-silver panels, shallow shadows.
Radius rule: every card, panel, button, input, menu, and chip must use 8px radius or less.
Palette: still water white, black body graphite, silver ripple, pond green, algae glass green, leg olive, mist gray, deep pond ink, reed amber.
Text: short readable UI labels only; spell exactly "Morphous Water Strider" and "Water Strider".
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no purple or blue gradient theme, no beige-heavy palette, no rounded elements over 8px, no stock UI kit look, no long paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of the theme name.

label: Dark Design System
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board, final catalog source image
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for a Morphous theme named exactly "Morphous Water Strider" / "Water Strider". Translate the existing light-mode Water Strider board into dark mode; keep it recognizably the same system, not a new theme.
Reference use: Preserve the same motif-derived palette roles, component coverage, typography hierarchy, board organization, texture rhythm, 8px radius discipline, and lightweight interaction language from the light board: black body graphite, silver ripple focus, pond green support, algae glass green, leg olive, deep pond ink, reed amber.
Canvas: exact 16:9 landscape board at 3840x2160 pixels. This must be a high-resolution source board, not a small preview.
Board organization: precise product UI board with large readable labels and a clean modular grid. Use fewer larger examples so labels remain legible when downscaled.
Required visible sections: Morphous Water Strider, Water Strider, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status States, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese type guidance using short labels: Geist, Inter, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数字.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, data table rows, command palette/search menu, status chips, loading/empty/error states, token swatches, texture samples.
Visual language: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design system, realistic UI mockup, dark background derived from deep pond ink and black body graphite, readable mist-silver text, silver ripple focus rings, pond green primary actions, algae glass accents, hairline separators like long water-strider legs, subtle surface-tension texture overlays, shallow dark shadows.
Radius rule: every card, panel, button, input, menu, and chip must use 8px radius or less.
Palette: deep pond ink, black body graphite, ripple silver, still water mist, pond green, algae glass green, leg olive, muted gray, reed amber.
Text: short readable UI labels only; spell exactly "Morphous Water Strider" and "Water Strider".
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no neon rainbow palette, no purple or blue gradient theme, no pure black flat-only background, no beige-heavy palette, no rounded elements over 8px, no stock UI kit look, no long paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of the theme name.
